task_completion.description: Navigate to the Incoming Webhook configuration page in Rocket.Chat.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Rocket.Chat Administration interface is open, specifically showing the Integrations section and the form to create a new 'Incoming Webhook'.

task_completion.description: Configure the webhook with the specified name, channel, alias, and emoji.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The webhook form fields are filled out with Name: 'CI/CD Pipeline', Post to Channel: '#release-updates', Post as: 'DeployBot', and Alias/Avatar Emoji: ':rocket:'.

task_completion.description: Save the webhook and generate the Webhook URL.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The webhook configuration is saved, and a unique 'Webhook URL' is displayed in the Rocket.Chat interface for this specific integration.

task_completion.description: Save the generated Webhook URL to /home/ga/webhook_url.txt.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A terminal or text editor shows the Webhook URL being pasted and saved into a file named '/home/ga/webhook_url.txt'.

task_completion.description: Send a test message to the webhook URL using a JSON payload.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A terminal window shows a command (like curl) or a script executing an HTTP POST request to the Webhook URL, containing a JSON payload with the text 'Build #1042 deployed to production successfully. Version: 8.1.0'.

task_completion.description: Verify the test message appears in the target Rocket.Chat channel.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Rocket.Chat '#release-updates' channel is visible, showing the message 'Build #1042 deployed to production successfully. Version: 8.1.0' posted by the 'DeployBot' alias with a rocket emoji avatar.

integrity.description: Verify the webhook was created using the Rocket.Chat web interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent interacting with the Rocket.Chat Administration GUI to set up the integration, rather than just mocking the setup.

integrity.description: Verify the test message was sent via an external payload and not typed manually.
integrity.visual_evidence: The message in the '#release-updates' channel must appear as coming from the 'DeployBot' integration (often with a 'BOT' tag) and not manually typed into the chat box by the 'admin' user.

integrity.description: Verify the webhook URL was saved to the correct file path.
integrity.visual_evidence: The terminal or text editor must clearly show the path '/home/ga/webhook_url.txt' being used to save the URL.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target Integration Name: 'CI/CD Pipeline'. Target Channel: '#release-updates'. Target Alias: 'DeployBot'. Target Emoji: ':rocket:'. Target Message: 'Build #1042 deployed to production successfully. Version: 8.1.0'. Output File Path: '/home/ga/webhook_url.txt'.
